steps.title: Follow the memory link
steps.content: The passage begins with Darius hearing Farsi in the car. The phrase "It reminded me of when I was little" shifts the passage into a childhood memory of his mother chanting in Farsi at bedtime.

steps.title: Reject false purposes
steps.content: Choice A overstates the role of Rumi and Hafez, who are only details in the memory. Choice B conflicts with the soothing tone. Choice C is unsupported because Darius's mother recites poems by others; the text does not say she is a poet. The answer is D.
